title: Get Rid of Breast Cancer
body:
In 2003 at [the Jackson State University](http://www.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/pubmed/12724920), USA, Dr,s who were interested how black seed had been used for such a long time for the treatment of so many acute ailments decided to study the blessed seed’s effectiveness in cancer prevention.
They exposed breast cancer cells to [the blessed seed](https://theblessedseed.com/learn-more/cancer/) extracts, the breast cancer cells were inactivated whereby they concluded that the blessed seed had promising results in the field of prevention and treatment of cancer.
